title: Fishing 钓鱼
scene: Grandpa带Ryan去湖边钓鱼，耐心等待鱼上钩。

lines.en: Ryan, come sit here. Let us go fishing today.
lines.zh: Ryan，过来坐这里。我们今天去钓鱼。

lines.en: Fishing? Do we have fishing rods?
Yes, I brought two. Here is yours.
lines.zh: 有，我带了两根。这是你的。

lines.en: What should I put on the hook?
Use this worm. Be careful, it is wiggly.
lines.zh: 用这条蚯蚓。小心，它在动。

lines.en: Yuck! OK, I put it on. Now what?
lines.zh: 好恶心！好的，放上去了。现在呢？

lines.en: Cast your line into the water and wait.
This is boring. How long do we wait?
Fishing teaches patience. Oh, I got a bite!
lines.zh: 钓鱼教人耐心。噢，有鱼上钩了！

lines.en: Wow! Pull it in! It is so big!
